task_name: service integration — bind tool, fallback gate, SSE, QA template

strengths: Clean separation of concerns: pure functions in artifact.ts, tool factory in createFile.ts, integration in service.ts
artifactEnabled presence guard correctly prevents undefined dep deref in both the default buildService harness and the T4-to-T5 production window
Editor slug derived from template's slugToOutputKey map rather than hardcoded, keeping fallback alive if column is renamed
TDD discipline maintained with 5 well-named test cases covering all DELIVERABLE scenarios
Closure binding preserves Tool.execute interface unchanged
